# Documentation Model Template

## Purpose

Use this template to define documentation levels, ownership, link style, and anti-duplication rules.

## Template Body

```md
# Documentation Model

## Goal

Describe what the documentation system must make possible.

## README Files Are Hubs

Explain how README files route readers.

## Single Source Of Truth

- <Rule>

## Responsibility Levels

### Container Level

- <Responsibility>

### Direction Level

- <Responsibility>

### Service Level

- <Responsibility>

## Where To Put Information

| Knowledge type | Source document |
| --- | --- |
| Current facts | `current-state.md` |
| Decisions | `docs/adr` |
| Contracts | `docs/contracts` |
| Terms | `glossary.md` |
| Questions | `open-questions.md` |

## Link Style

Describe relative links and cross-repository link rules.
```
